name_en: 25b New Makeup Bag, Caviar Leather, really exquisite. High-visibility enamel logo, double-C adjustable buckle is a highlight~ I'm falling in love with this makeup bag more and more. It looks beautiful when carried casually. Pairs perfectly with any outfit to make you look stunning.

Model A
